channel.title: summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from summarizedStoriesMainNLbreakingNews, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Schiff launches inquiry into DOJ's closure of baby formula probe
item.description: Sen. Schiff is investigating why the DOJ ended a criminal probe into Cronobacter contamination at an Abbott Lab facility.

item.title: Devastation, agony and hope: What we saw in Venezuela after the earthquakes
item.description: Last month's earthquakes in Venezuela caused catastrophic damage in La Guaira, killing thousands and prompting rescue efforts.

item.title: Mexico seeks prosecutions over deaths in U.S. after fatal ICE shooting
item.description: Mexico's government criticized the treatment of its citizens under President Trump's deportation push.

item.title: Ex-Epoch Times CFO pleads guilty in $67 million money laundering scheme
item.description: The former CFO of The Epoch Times pleaded guilty during jury selection in his money laundering trial.
